## Description

Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature / workflow / module
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / Code cleanup
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Infrastructure change

## Environment Impact

- [ ] DEV
- [ ] STAGE
- [ ] PROD
- [ ] All environments

## Testing

Describe how you tested:

- [ ] `terraform validate` / `actionlint` / syntax check
- [ ] Plan output reviewed
- [ ] Deployed to DEV
- [ ] Deployed to STAGE
- [ ] Manual verification

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] SHA-pinned all GitHub Actions (if applicable)
- [ ] `timeout-minutes` set on all jobs (if applicable)
- [ ] `terraform fmt` applied (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-environment consistency verified
